w:r.w:t: Use flutter_bloc for all state management. No GetX, Provider, or setState for business logic.
Appointment booking (future date/time) and Walk-in Check-In (today, nearest slot).
Show shimmer/skeleton placeholders while APIs are loading services and time slots.
Auto-complete phone number field by searching existing customers from the API.
Detect if a service requires consent. Show signature dialog or skip based on API response.
Past dates must not be selectable. Check-In skips calendar — uses today.
Celebration animation screen → Appointment detail summary screen.
On success: store token + call outlet/status to get tenantId, outletId.
checkbox: persist credentials using secure storage.
Logout FAB bottom-right: clear session and navigate to Login.
3-column grid layout with category header rows.
Skeleton should match final grid shape (3 cols × N rows).
button on each card adds to cart (turns filled/red on selection).
Bottom bar shows: Total: $X.XX + N Services Selected + Continue button.
Continue is disabled until at least 1 service is selected.
Grid of staff cards with avatar, name, role.
Each card has a unique pastel background color.
Selected card shows red border + red name text.
Continue enabled only when a staff member is selected.
(no API call; date is passed to next screen)
Calendar widget — today highlighted in red.
All past dates are greyed out and not tappable.
Check-In mode: skip this screen entirely, use
Show skeleton rows (3 groups × 8 pills each) while loading.
Check-In mode: skip this screen, auto-pick nearest available slot.
Red border + filled background on selected slot.
Bottom bar: Total + time range (e.g. "11:00 AM – 1:15 PM • 2 Services").
Two-column layout (iPad): left = booking summary, right = customer form.
Phone field triggers autocomplete dropdown on partial match.
Tapping a suggestion fills First Name, Last Name, Email automatically.
Country code picker (+1 default) before phone input.
Scrollable consent text at top of dialog.
Confirm calls consent/customer-sign then proceeds to booking.
Full-screen white celebration animation (Lottie or custom).
Auto-navigate to detail screen after 2–3 seconds OR on tap.
Red-bordered card with: date, time range, provider name, customer name.
Services listed with price per service.
Back arrow returns to Kiosk Home (clearing all booking state).
All requests require Authorization header after login: Bearer {token}
Authenticate with email and password. Returns JWT token, tenantId, outletId.
Store token in secure storage. Use tenantId and outletId in all subsequent requests.
Get current outlet info including tenantId and outletId.
Called immediately after login to confirm outlet context.
Fetch all service categories and their services for the tenant.
Group services by category. Each service has: id, name, price, durationMin, consentRequired, consentFormId.
Get all staff members available at the outlet.
Display in grid. Each staff card gets a deterministic pastel color based on index.
Get available time slots for a staff member on a specific date.
Check-In mode: use today's date, auto-pick nearest available slot. Do not show slot selection screen.
Search customers by partial phone number for autocomplete.
Trigger on each keystroke (debounce 300ms). On selection, auto-fill First Name, Last Name, Email fields.
Check if a customer needs to sign consent for a service.
If signingFrequency == ONCE_PER_CUSTOMER AND needsSignature == false → skip consent dialog.
Submit signed consent form after customer signs.
Call this before POST appointment. signatureType enum: CHECKBOX_ONLY, SIGNATURE_IMAGE, TYPED_NAME.
Create a new appointment for a future date/time.
isWalkIn: false. requiresConsent: false (consent handled separately).
Create a walk-in check-in appointment (today, nearest slot).
Same as appointment but no date picker; server uses current time.
No isWalkIn field in this payload. Auto-select nearest available slot from staff/slots API.
// Note: no "isWalkIn" field in checkin payload
in SessionCubit when user taps a card on Kiosk Home.
is true, skip screen and pass
Strip country code prefix before sending
Debounce the text field (300ms) to avoid hammering the API on every keystroke.
Show a dropdown overlay (Overlay widget or similar) below the phone field.
On tap of a suggestion row: populate firstName, lastName, email via BLoC event.
for the consent check API call.
1. Check if any selected service has
5. Otherwise → show consent dialog with scrollable text + signature canvas.
Match skeleton shape exactly to the real content (3-col grid for services, pill rows for slots).
Show skeleton immediately on event dispatch before API returns.
Replace skeleton with real content on
Disable past dates in calendar: use
Time slot end time = startTime + total duration of all selected services.
Pass booking data via route arguments or shared BLoC provided higher up.
On booking success, clear all booking BLoCs and navigate
Back arrow on appointment detail should pop back to Kiosk Home (not to form).
